resources.string: During the backup process, please keep the device connected normally, do not use personal hotspot, and keep Wi-Fi turned on. Check the device status and try again.
The AI Gallery backup of the device \"%1$s\" is not completed. Disconnect the device?
The %2$s feature cannot be used properly. Please visit %3$s (copy and paste) on your PC to download the latest version of the %1$s client.
Cast mobile videos to your computer, and don\'t miss every detail.
%1$s won\'t work unless you enable Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device.
%1$s won\'t run unless you update Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are currently updating.
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Select %1$s on your PC to bring up the QR code.
Please turn on the Wi-Fi and Bluetooth of the PC you want to connect to, and open the PC client. You can visit %1$s to download the client.

Turn on Wi-Fi and Bluetooth on the PC. After connection, you can easily cast your phone screen or transfer files. For Infinix PCs, Infinix PC Connection is pre-installed with a shortcut on the desktop. For PCs of other brands, visit %1$s to easily download the PC client.

Turn on Wi-Fi and Bluetooth on the PC. After connection, you can easily cast your phone screen or transfer files. For TECNO PCs, PC Manager or OneLeap is pre-installed with a shortcut on the desktop. For PCs of other brands, visit %1$s to easily download the PC client.
Connection failed. Please retry with a USB cable.
1. Use a standard data cable to connect the mobile device and PC.\n2. Select %1$s in the pop-up window.
蓝牙已关闭，已终止“%1$s”功能。
个人热点已开启，已终止“%1$s”功能。
To get the latest client, you can visit %2$s on your PC.
Effortless Multi-Window Control, No Need to Pick up the Phone
Effortless Multi-Window Control, No Need to Pick up the Phone
Enable Wi-Fi and Bluetooth on the PC, and launch PC Manager or One Leap on the TECNO comptuers. For third-party computers, you may quickly download the client at www.pcconnection.online.
Drag-and-drop file sharing comes along with cross-device clipboard syncing.
Hold and drag a file to transfer it between your phone and your PC.\n*On phones, this feature is supported for AI Gallery and File Manager.
Cast multiple apps at the same time, so you can, for example, chat while watching videos.\n*Supported on some PCs only.
Screenshots or photos you take on your phone will be synced to your PC.
Operation on your phone will be synced to your PC, avoiding repetitive steps.
Select a file and swipe right with 3 fingers to easily and quickly transfer it to your PC.\n*On phones, this feature is supported for AI Gallery and File Manager.
Text you copy on your phone can be pasted directly to your PC.
请关闭个人热点，以确保 %1$s 可正常运作
Mirror your phone to a PC or tablet and enjoy seamless cross-device copy-paste, file transfer, and backup for a smarter work and entertainment experience.
Enjoy Mobile Videos on Larger Screen
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Select the devices that can find this device.
Cast your phone to a tablet for a widescreen view. You can continue using your phone without interrupting the cast.
Mirror your phone to a PC or tablet and enjoy seamless cross-device copy-paste, file transfer, and backup for a smarter work and entertainment experience. For details, refer to the %1$s.
Cast mobile videos to your computer, and don\'t miss every detail.
Use the Multiple App Windows to chat on WhatsApp during gameplay.
Easily drag and drop files to transfer. Copy content on one device and paste on another.
View phone content on a larger screen and control your phone directly from the tablet.
Once your phone and tablet are connected, you can copy and paste text across them. \nCopy content on one device and paste it instantly on the other.
Enable Phone Screen Extension for immersive, large-screen viewing. Handling other tasks on the phone will not interrupt the extended display.
Screen mirroring and extension, data sharing, etc. between phones, tablets, and PCs.
You can answer incoming phone calls and talk on your tablet.
You can view and reply to text messages from your phone on your tablet.
Copy and paste text, images, and more across devices.
Swipe Right with 3 Fingers to Send Selected Files
Transfer images, videos, files, and more to your PC. Transfer large files quickly without using data.
Double-tap with 3 Fingers to Copy to PC Clipboard
Copy images, videos, files, and more to the PC clipboard for smooth cross-device pasting on connected PCs.
Receive, view, and manage phone notifications directly on your PC or tablet for seamless cross-device alerts.
Allow connected devices to use this device\'s mobile data network.
Quickly trigger screen mirroring, cross-device copying, file transfer, and more using gesture controls.
Pinch in and Swipe with 3 Fingers to Quickly Start Mirroring
Quickly mirror your phone screen to the PC using gesture controls.
Trusted devices and devices signed in to the same account
No need to ask again when connecting this device.
Mirror the phone to a PC for larger screen viewing and rapid file transfer without using data. Consent to the following permissions is required, which are solely for the functionality needed.
Only used to sync notifications from your phone to your PC, and not to upload them to the server.
You can copy images, videos, text, etc. to your PC\'s clipboard and paste them directly from your PC.
You can copy images, videos, and other files to your PC\'s clipboard and paste them directly from your PC.
Double-tap with 3 Fingers to Copy to PC\'s Clipboard
You can transfer images, videos, files, etc. from your phone to your PC. Also, you can open the phone mirroring window on your PC.
You can transfer images, videos, files, etc. to your PC. Rapid and data-free transfer of large files is also supported.
Swipe Right with 3 Fingers to Transfer Selected Files
You can transfer images, videos, etc. from your phone to your PC with gestures. Rapid and data-free transfer of large files is also supported.
Please check the connection status on your PC
Please turn off Hotspot and connect
Please open the QR code page on the PC.
Scan the QR code to connect.
Connection timeout. Please make sure %1$s has been installed on your PC
Keep your phone close to your PC.
Make sure Bluetooth and Wi-Fi are enabled on your PC.
Make sure Bluetooth and Wi-Fi are enabled on your phone.
\"%1$s\" has rejected the connection to the phone. Please reconnect.
The shared link has been copied to the clipboard.
You can use your phone as an extended screen for your PC to get an efficient work experience on multiple screens.

Use your phone as an extended screen for your PC to get an efficient work experience on multiple screens. Please make sure Bluetooth and Wi-Fi are enabled on both your phone and PC. This function does not consume any data.
After connection, you can use multi-device collaboration features like Screen Mirroring and File Transfer.
Use gestures to allow quick screen mirroring to the computer.
Pinch In and Swipe Right with 3 Fingers to Quickly Enable Mirroring
Pinch in and swipe with 3 fingers to mirror the phone screen to your PC.
You can visit %1$s on your PC to get the latest client
The link has been copied to Clipboard
Place the phone on the PC NFC chip that supports this feature to connect.\nPlease check if the phone supports NFC first.
To connect a device using %1$s, you need to open the PC client, make sure the Wi-Fi and Bluetooth are enabled on the phone and PC, and keep the screen on and unlocked.
To get the latest client, you can visit %1$s on your PC.

1. Tap Scan to Connect on the PC client to bring up the QR code.\n2. Swipe down from the top right side of the phone screen to access Control Center, long press PC Connection to jump to the PC Connection page, and tap the Scan button in the upper right corner to scan the QR code to connect.

1. Swipe down from the top right side of the phone to access Control Center and select PC Connection.\n2. Select the device you want to connect to in the pop-up window.\n3. Select Allow Connection on the PC.
1. Use the standard data cable to connect the phone and PC.\n2. Select PC Connection in the pop-up window.
Please make sure the PC\'s Wi-Fi and Bluetooth are turned on to use this feature.
Please open the phone to use %1$s
Open the %1$s page of the PC client, and scan the QR code to connect.
Don\'t see the device you want to connect to here?
After connection, you can use features like Screen Mirroring and File Transfer without data consumption.
Please turn on the Wi-Fi and Bluetooth of the PC you want to connect to, and open the PC client.
After connection, you can use multi-device collaboration features like Screen Mirroring and File Transfer.
Currently connected device does not support this feature
Connection Timeout: Please Ensure the PC Client Is Installed
You can go to www.pcconnection.online to download and install
Connection timeout. Please connect to the device again as prompted.
Connection timeout. Please install the PC client first
Allow \"%1$s\" to connect this phone? Tap \"Allow\" to operate your mobile phone from your PC and transfer files.
Please keep Bluetooth and Wi-Fi turned on for normal functioning of %1$s
%1$s will be auto disabled in %2$s minute(s)
To use %1$s or %2$s, please make sure the corresponding PC client has been downloaded from %3$s and installed.
To use %1$s, please make sure the PC client has been downloaded from %2$s and installed.
Once connected, you can use Screen Mirroring.
You can transfer files between your PC and your phone without using mobile data.
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
Please check whether your mobile device supports NFC first.\nPlace the mobile device on the NFC chip of the PC that supports this feature to connect.
Please open the \"Scan to connect\" page on the PC client.
Currently connected to another device. If you continue enabling Phone Collaboration, the connection with that device will be disconnected.
Failed to connect. Please try again.
Tap Scanner in your phone\'s Control Center, and scan the QR code above to connect to the tablet.
Only used to connect to tablets or PCs.
Only used to connect to devices via QR code scanning.

Welcome to %1$s! Once connected, your tablet can serve as an extended screen for your PC, enabling efficient dual-screen work and cross-device copy-paste functionality, all without using mobile data. We will request the following permissions:
Only used to search for nearby PCs available for connection.
Only used to display connection status.
Share your phone screen with the tablet and open the screen mirroring window on the tablet.
Please connect your phone and %1$s to the same network, then turn on again.

Cast your phone screen to a tablet for a big-screen viewing experience. Operate your phone directly from the tablet, all without using mobile data. The following permissions are required and will only be used to enable the feature.
Allow the app to use the following permissions solely for discovering and connecting to tablets and displaying the connection status.
After connection, PC SubDisplay is available, and you can use your tablet as an extended screen for your PC.
The Allow Call Sharing feature has been turned off on your phone. Please go to Settings > Multi-Device Connection > Multi-Screen Connection to turn it on to receive call notifications.
When your phone and tablet are connected, you can copy and paste text across the devices. Copy content on one device, and directly paste on the other.
Before using %1$s to extend screen, please ensure the %2$s client has been installed on the PC. To download the client, visit %3$s.
When it\'s enabled, mobile devices can be found and connected by the PC.
After connection, %1$s is available, and you can use your tablet as an extended screen for your PC and do more.
To use %3$s to connect devices, you need to enable Wi-Fi and Bluetooth and open the %1$s client on the PC, enable %2$s on the mobile device, and keep the mobile device screen unlocked and turned on.
To use the following features, you need to enable Wi-Fi and Bluetooth on the PC and open the %1$s client. If this client has not been installed on the PC, visit %2$s to download and install it.
The waiting time is longer than expected. You can keep waiting or try another way to connect.
Please allow the connection on the PC client to continue.
Use your tablet as an extended screen for your PC. Work on two screens anytime, anywhere, improving your efficiency. The tablet and PC share the clipboard, copying on one and pasting on the other.
Use your tablet as an extended screen for your PC. Work on two screens anytime, anywhere, improving your efficiency. The tablet and PC share the clipboard, copying on one and pasting on the other.
Only used to find and connect to nearby devices.
Please grant all permissions to use PC Connection.
Please grant all permissions to use PC Connection.
Allow this app to use the following permissions (for PC connection, file transfer, and display of transfer progress only).
Only used to show the progress of file transfers.
Actions on the phone will not interrupt the screen casting.
Enable %1$s for an immersive big-screen experience. Other tasks on the phone will not interrupt the casting.
Open the screen mirroring window on the tablet.
To pair the Matter device, please scan to get the pairing code first.
This device is not supported for now

1. Tap Scan to Connect in the PC client to bring up the QR code.\n2. Swipe down from the upper right side on the mobile device to bring up Control Center, long press %1$s (%2$s for tablets) to go to the %1$s page, tap the Scan button on the upper right corner, and scan the QR code to connect.
Select %2$s > Scan to Connect in %1$s, and place the QR code within the frame to scan.
Chat and watch videos simultaneously with split-screen functionality.
The SwiftCopy gesture has been triggered. Go to %1$s to connect to your PC, and you can paste directly on your PC.
The Mirroring gesture has been triggered. Go to %1$s to connect to your PC, and your phone screen will be mirrored to the PC, enabling data sharing between the devices.
The SwiftSend gesture has been triggered. Go to %1$s to connect to your PC and start transferring the selected files.
Quickly copy and paste to a computer with a three-finger double-tap.
Swipe sideways with three fingers to swiftly send selected files to a connected computer.
Please install the PC client first
URL copied. Please visit and download on the PC.
请确认电脑端已安装「PC管家」客户端，然后再重新插线连接。下载地址%1$s
Please ensure the PC client has been installed on the PC, then reconnect the cable. Download link: %1$s

When connected to a 2.4GHz Wi-Fi network, using %1$s may cause lag. It is recommended to switch Wi-Fi to the 5GHz band or disconnect from Wi-Fi (while keeping the Wi-Fi toggle on) to improve performance.
Effective when connected to the same Wi-Fi network
